page_content:
DANC606 Pedagogy Practicum (1 Credit)

An embodied laboratory where students deepen their teaching practices and develop new and innovative curricular formats and structures for their dance studio courses. Students will serve as an apprentice to faculty instructors of record teaching a course in order to deepen their understanding of course content delivery. The course culminates in the student developing their own syllabus for the course they have attended for the semester.
